---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenPublisher
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: rmellis

---

**Before you submit:**
<!-- Please remember that OpenPublisher is maintained by a very small team of two. To keep the software fast and maintainable, we are highly selective about new features. If you intend to write the code for this feature yourself, you MUST get approval from a maintainer on this issue before opening a Pull Request. -->

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem or workflow limitation is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when trying to align multiple shapes because..." -->

**Describe the solution you'd like**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. How would this feature fit into OpenPublisher's existing interface (e.g., which Ribbon tab, Sidebar, or context menu would it live in)? -->

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
<!-- A clear and concise description of any manual workarounds you currently use, or how other desktop publishing software handles this feature. -->

**Mockups or Additional context**
<!-- Add any other context here. Since OpenPublisher is a visual design tool, UI sketches, mockups, or screenshots are incredibly helpful for explaining your idea! -->
